summary: W861 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while feeding the W860 endpoint/localized target-ExactAt route from W733 concrete leaves plus the W785 target ExactAt payload. It projects the W725 matched closedness branch and assembles the W726 endpoint/localized-right-adjoint data from W733, then reuses W860/W859/W832 for direct bounded left calculus and the stable package. Product success remains false because the concrete leaves, target ExactAt payload, stable-category inputs, final original-four-task witness, and completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W861 derives the W860 data surface from W733 concrete leaves and W785 payload data, but still requires concrete W733 leaves, a concrete W785 target ExactAt payload, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated data.

The W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider is still not concretely instantiated; its boundary, relation, target-surjective/compact, closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint/localized data, concrete leaves, and downstream target ExactAt payload fields remain open.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block W733 concrete leaves or the W785 target ExactAt payload, then wire the resulting fully concrete input into the W861 route.
Connect the W861 route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs and stable-category hypotheses are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
